entities.description: A breeding method used to develop the ICCV1 cultivar

entities.description: The duration from sowing to flowering, which is 60-70 days for ICCV1

entities.description: An agricultural input to which ICCV1 responds well

entities.description: The physical dimension and weight of seeds, with a 100-seed weight of 16 g for ICCV1
